title: Fluffy Uruguayan Chocolate Muffins
description: These muffins are a delicious Uruguayan dish featuring tempering chocolate and raw friendly ingredients, perfect for a snack or dessert. They have a pillowy texture and umami flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the almond flour, coconut sugar, and unsweetened cocoa powder.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, melted chocolate, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Divide the batter evenly among 12 muffin cups.
Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
Allow the muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
